title: 'Amanah #0549
definition:
Amana = "support"

 1) a river flowing into the plain of Damascus from Antilebanon
 2) mountainous area of the river's origin
nasbUsage:
Definition: Amana = "support"

 1) a river flowing into the plain of Damascus from Antilebanon
 2) mountainous area of the river's origin

    NASB:  a river near Damascus (the same as 71), also the region from which it flows
